text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Ever since I became Sasami<n>Anshinzawa's
acupuncture test<n>dummy, I've grown
accustomed to<n>playing along with her whims. On
one<n>such day...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Hey, <username>! Look at what I've<n>got!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I won this ticket for a hot spring<n>vacation from a
raffle! This must be<n>some kind of reward for my
usual<n>good deeds! ♪
choice_data_list: What good deeds? Er, I mean, congratulations.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Gosh, what's with that lukewarm<n>response?
You're coming along as<n>well, you know?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
The ticket's for two, and who better<n>to invite
along than my trusty partner?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Now enough talking. Off to the hot<n>spring we go!
♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Wow! ☆ What a luxurious inn! ♪ I'm<n>definitely
gonna brag about this to my<n>master after I get
back!
choice_data_list: Are you sure I should be here with you?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Of course! Consider it thanks for<n>always
cooperating with my<n>acupuncture practice! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but don't start thinking that I<n>settled for you
because I had nobody<n>else to invite. I'm not
some loner<n>without friends, you hear me?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Mmm! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh... That felt fantastic! ♪ There's<n>nothing
more relaxing than a soak in a<n>hot spring! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After a soothing bath, I happen to<n>bump into
Sasami Anshinzawa in the<n>corridor.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Oh! Did you just finish bathing as<n>well?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hot springs sure are amazing! Their<n>restorative
properties are on par with<n>those of acupuncture!
♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, do you want to go explore the<n>souvenir shop
with me? You should<n>get something for your
trainee there!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, acupuncture has a big<n>history in the
local area, so we<n>somehow end up buying
matching<n>needle keychains...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I'm in heaven! Whatwould I give to just kick back andrelax here for eternity! ♪
choice_data_list: That won't do. You know that.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I do... I still have an important<n>duty to fulfill,
after all!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I'm duty bound to help Umamusume<n>with my
needles and relieve them of<n>their worries!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to your assistance, I'm a<n>much better
acupuncturist than before!<n>And I'm going to keep
on honing my<n>skills! ♪
choice_data_list:
That's the spirit! Let's work on improving your
success rate!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Yep! With you as my partner, I know I<n>can make
it big in the acupuncture<n>world!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I know! If we're going to do this,<n>why don't
we expand overseas?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
We can share the wonders of<n>acupuncture with
people all over the<n>world! My little sister's
well-informed<n>about global affairs, so I'm sure<n>
she'd be happy to lend a hand! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: But wait, there's more! When the<n>time comes—
choice_data_list: ...I'm sorry, but I need to be there for my trainee.
...I'm sorry, but I need to be there for my trainee.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you! Did you think I was serious?!<n>I was only
pulling your leg! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I have no intention of getting in<n>between you and
your racer! None at<n>all!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
However, my gratitude for you comes<n>from the
heart! ♪ Master even said I<n>can move on from
fetching drin—ahem,<n>that I'm allowed to proceed
to the<n>next step of my training!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
With me on poking duty and you as<n>my backup,
we're sure to be on the<n>steadiest road to
success! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, nothing beats an<n>acupuncture session
after a nice<n>relaxing soak! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I prepared some special needles for<n>today!
Come on, get ready to get a<n>few pokes in you! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I already had my suspicions, so I'm<n>not
surprised things turned out this<n>way...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
But then again, this is just par for the<n>course
when it comes to the two of<n>us.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Hold still... Annnd poke!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Puncture Perfect!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Well? Am I amazing or what? I<n>practiced my butt
off for today! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Thud!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! The treatment was<n>successful, so what's
going on?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Was it too effective? Hellooo?Can you hear me?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Dang it! I'll get it perfectly right next<n>time!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to look after you so well,<n>you'll regret
ever refusing my offer! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
So you'd better have <chrname>'s<n>back and
support her as best you can,<n>m'kay?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
You sense that you and Sasami<n>Anshinzawa
have formed an<n>irreplaceable bond during this
time<n>together.
choice_data_list: (Wait, is that something you of all people should be saying?!)

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Despite my consciousness slipping<n>further and
further away, my<n>indignance still slips through in
one<n>final mental outburst.
